tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting impaired glucose metabolism or early diabetes, despite normal fasting glucose. Creatinine is slightly elevated, which may indicate reduced kidney function. Other parameters, including electrolytes, urea, and calcium, are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of renal function and glycemic control.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
